name: blockchain-starter
description: Blockchain (EVM) starter — local Hardhat chain + indexer API + React wallet UI. Services are added by the DevLay agent during the build.

services.name: chain
services.description: Local Hardhat node with AceToken auto-deploy on boot

services.name: api
services.description: REST API — token info and balance lookup via ethers

services.name: web
services.description: React + Vite UI for token info and balance lookup
